feed.title: Memedroid
feed.subtitle: Trending memes from memedroid.com (no native feed; scraped from the server-rendered homepage).

entry.title: We need more nice people like this guy.
Just waiting for Dems to deny they ever supported this damaged Freak
Here you go my aviation autists.
Updated the meme for newest results
When the only line you prepared for court was "Thank you, Your Honour." ?
The law is the law. We must obey
Once you die, they paint over you signature
